ddls:
CREATE TABLE "auctions" (
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction */,
  "auction_name" TEXT /* Name of the auction (e.g., ADESA, MANHEIM, OTHER) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the auction */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the auction */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the auction */,
  "auction_type" TEXT /* Type of auction (e.g., LIVE, ONLINE) */,
  "auction_status" TEXT /* Status of the auction (e.g., UPCOMING, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auction_houses" (
  "auction_house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction house */,
  "auction_house_name" TEXT /* Name of the auction house */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the auction house */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auction_house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auction where the vehicle was sold */,
  "auction_house_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auction house where the vehicle was sold */,
  "vehicle_age" INTEGER /* Age of the vehicle in years */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., KIA, CHEVROLET) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Transmission type of the vehicle (e.g., AUTO) */,
  "wheel_type" TEXT /* Wheel type of the vehicle (e.g., Alloy, Covers) */,
  "odometer_reading" INTEGER /* Odometer reading of the vehicle */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the vehicle (e.g., ASIAN, AMERICAN) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the vehicle (e.g., SMALL, MEDIUM, LARGE) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle (e.g., EXCELLENT, GOOD, FAIR) */,
  "number_of_doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors in the vehicle */,
  "number_of_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_auction_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_house_id") REFERENCES auction_houses ("auction_house_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_nationality FOREIGN KEY ("nationality") REFERENCES nationalities ("nationality_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_make FOREIGN KEY ("make") REFERENCES makes ("make_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_color FOREIGN KEY ("color") REFERENCES colors ("color_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_auction_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_id") REFERENCES auctions ("auction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_size FOREIGN KEY ("size") REFERENCES sizes ("size_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being sold */,
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auction where the vehicle was sold */,
  "auction_house_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auction house where the vehicle was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the vehicle */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "buyer_email" TEXT /* Email of the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_auction_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_id") REFERENCES auctions ("auction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_auction_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_house_id") REFERENCES auction_houses ("auction_house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being priced */,
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auction where the vehicle was priced */,
  "mmr_acquisition_auction_clean_price" REAL /* MMR acquisition auction clean price */,
  "mmr_acquisition_retail_average_price" REAL /* MMR acquisition retail average price */,
  "estimated_market_value" REAL /* Estimated market value of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_auction_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_id") REFERENCES auctions ("auction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being predicted */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the vehicle */,
  "probability_of_bad_buy" REAL /* Probability of the vehicle being a bad buy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nationalities" (
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nationality */,
  "nationality_name" TEXT /* Name of the nationality (e.g., ASIAN, AMERICAN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nationality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., SMALL, MEDIUM, LARGE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the make (e.g., KIA, CHEVROLET) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the vehicle */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission type (e.g., AUTO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wheel_types" (
  "wheel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wheel type */,
  "wheel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the wheel type (e.g., Alloy, Covers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wheel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., EXCELLENT, GOOD, FAIR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., ANALYST, SALESMAN, ADMINISTRATOR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
